margin"}]}]},{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":" borrowing on the aforementioned isolated margin pair(s). At "}]},{"node":"element","tag":"strong","child":[{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":"2024-07-24 06:00 (UTC)"}]}]},{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":", Binance Margin will close users’ positions, conduct an automatic settlement, and cancel all pending orders on the aforementioned isolated margin pair(s). These pair(s) will then be removed from Margin. "}]}]}]}]},{"node":"element","tag":"ul","attr":{"data-block-id":"77c14eef-51a3-4842-8ab7-5b958a7a23e2"},"child":[{"node":"element","tag":"li","attr":{"data-block-id":"a7bb56a3-4722-4f47-8aea-82cb2211bcd0"},"child":[{"node":"element","tag":"p","attr":{"data-block-id":"aca4aa7d-fc92-4a66-98dc-42bf14b28451"},"child":[{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":"At "}]},{"node":"element","tag":"strong","child":[{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":"2024-07-24 06:00 (UTC)"}]}]},{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":", Binance Margin will cancel all pending orders on users’ "}]},{"node":"element","tag":"strong","child":[{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":"cross margin"}]}]},{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":" accounts if they contain TUSD liabilities and/or assets. Binance Margin will then conduct an automatic settlement of any existing TUSD liabilities and thereafter transfer any remaining TUSD assets to users’ Spot Wallets. "}]}]}]}]},{"node":"element","tag":"ul","attr":{"data-block-id":"4d5ff0de-9f44-4f64-ae51-87cb85141a7b"},"child":[{"node":"element","tag":"li","attr":{"data-block-id":"6de66424-791b-4dfb-9cbf-707c8cd4274b"},"child":[{"node":"element","tag":"p","attr":{"data-block-id":"8f6380b6-894f-4c56-8a8d-22da1b5f0362"},"child":[{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":"Please note that users will "}]},{"node":"element","tag":"strong","child":[{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":"not"}]}]},{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":" be able to update their positions during the delisting process, and they are strongly advised to close their positions and/or transfer their assets from Margin Wallets to Spot Wallets prior to the cessation of margin trading at "}]},{"node":"element","tag":"strong","child":[{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":"2024-07-24 06:00 (UTC)"}]}]},{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":". Users should monitor the Unified Maintenance Margin Ratio (uniMMR) closely to avoid any potential liquidation that may result from the removal of the aforementioned token(s) from the Margin Wallet. "}]}]}]},{"node":"element","tag":"li","attr":{"data-block-id":"716b3054-0928-4ce8-98b7-bee4bde2ddbf"},"child":[{"node":"element","tag":"p","attr":{"data-block-id":"d942b21c-5b57-4aaf-85b8-34d8d7f09fcd"},"child":[{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":"All TUSD balances in Cross Margin Wallet under the Portfolio Margin account will be automatically converted to USDT from"}]},{"node":"element","tag":"strong","child":[{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":" 2024-07-24 06:00 (UTC)"}]}]},{"node":"element","tag":"span","attr":{"style":["color:","rgb(0,","0,","0)"]},"child":[{"node":"text","text":". Spot trading services are provided by Nest Exchange Limited, which is a Recognised Investment Exchange in the Abu Dhabi Global Market and is an exchange authorised and regulated by the Financial Services Regulatory Authority. For the avoidance of doubt, this announcement is an Exchange Notice for the purposes of Binance’s Exchange Rules. For more information, see our Terms of Use and Risk Warning.
